'''ngasïfjïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okta|okta]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okta|okta]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ngasïfjïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngæsïfjïfth || ngæsïfjïfj || ngæsïfjïfsh || ngæsïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngasïfsïfjïfth || ngasïfsïfjïfj || ngasïfsïfjïfsh || ngasïfsïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngasïfjïfth || ngasïfjïfj || ngasïfjïfsh || ngasïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngasïffjïffth || ngasïffjïffj || ngasïffjïffsh || ngasïffjïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngasïfjïfïf || ngasïfjïfïf || ngasïfjïfïf || ngasïfjïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngasïfjïfth || ngasïfjïfj || ngasïfjïfsh || ngasïfjïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngasïfjïfïfl || ngasïfjïfïfl || ngasïfjïfïfl || ngasïfjïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngasïfjïfïfïf || ngasïfjïfïfïf || ngasïfjïfïfïf || ngasïfjïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngasïfjïfïfn || ngasïfjïfïfn || ngasïfjïfïfn || ngasïfjïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngasïfjïfïforo || ngasïfjïfïforo || ngasïfjïfïforo || ngasïfjïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
